testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
16:24:39.193 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.timely.ProyectoTimely.ProyectoTimelyApplicationTests]: ProyectoTimelyApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 16:24:39.319 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.timely.ProyectoTimely.ProyectoTimelyApplication for test class com.timely.ProyectoTimely.ProyectoTimelyApplicationTests 16:24:39.492 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
